CONTENT.Career statistics: Scores and results list Slovenia's goal tally first, score column indicates score after each Vršič goal.
CONTENT.International career: Vršič was capped 13 times for the Slovenia national team between 2007 and 2012. He made his debut on 2 June 2007 against Romania.

SUMMARY: Dare Vršič (born 26 September 1984) is a Slovenian footballer who plays for Korte as a midfielder. Besides Slovenia, he has played in Slovakia, Romania and Austria.
